nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Defines Python coding style conventions for ECC projects, covering PEP 8 standards, immutability preferences (frozen dataclasses, tuples, constants), and Black/isort formatting requirements.

nodes.name: fastapi.md
nodes.summary: Prescribes FastAPI-specific rules across 7 areas: project structure, async usage, dependency injection patterns, Pydantic schema design, security (OAuth2/JWT), and test client setup.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Short guide for Python hook scripts in the ECC harness, specifying PostToolUse hook patterns and warnings about blocking operations in hook handlers.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Documents preferred Python design patterns including Protocol-based duck typing, dataclass DTOs, context managers, and generator usage with code examples.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Specifies Python security requirements covering secret management via environment variables or vaults, and static security scanning with bandit and safety.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Defines Python testing standards using pytest with coverage thresholds, fixture-based test organization, and naming conventions aligned to ECC project structure.
